name: Personal Capital Proving Ground
objective: Build a 60-90 day audited live P&L curve on user's personal brokerage + TAO validator to prove (or disprove) that the 13-agent ensemble and arb executor have real edge net of costs. Kill-or-go gate for the entire paid-product roadmap. Top priority per 2026-04-14 dogfood pivot.
priority_note: Gates Tracks A-F of the revenue roadmap. Do not start Tracks A-E until T.5 either promotes a strategy to live (edge confirmed) or formally kills the arb track (edge absent).
exit_criteria: T.1: Validator baseline measured; scoring optimized; rank improvement documented over 7+ days
T.2: CostModel shipped; 30-day backtest report at docs/backtests/arb-YYYY-MM-DD.md; kill-or-go decision recorded
T.3: 13-agent ensemble reviewed through cost model; agents.yaml updated with performance-justified allocations
T.4: Per-agent position caps + per-hour loss circuit breakers in place; kill-switch integration test passing
T.5: Promotion criteria written; first-live runbook specifies exact agent/broker/size/stop
First live $500 sleeve deployed OR arb track formally killed in docs/decisions/
